title: Manufacturing Engineer - LG Electronics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - LG Electronics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India:
LG Electronics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
